productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Striped Pink Top
description: Style Notepalm tree's fun tee for girls, crafted from supersoft cotton, so comfy she'll never want to take it off. Conjured up from the whimsical elements of the spring, this simple striped tee is a summer must-have!Product DetailsPink and white striped top with a round neck, black trims, short sleeves and a hood, has flaring pin-tucks at the chest and crystal embellishment at the left chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
